key_needs: Chicken breast (2 lbs) or turkey if cheaper
Avoid shellfish, beef, pork, soy/tofu, and cow’s milk
Prefer no artificial fragrances; eco-friendly packaging
summary: Weekly household order for the Williams household with a $180 total budget. Must-haves include chicken breast (or turkey if cheaper), fresh spinach, cherry tomatoes, avocados, brown rice, olive oil, dairy-free Greek-style yogurt, and unsweetened almond milk. Also restock pantry items (black beans, chickpeas, salsa, oats) and household supplies (paper towels, dish soap, kitchen trash bags). Preferences: avoid shellfish, beef, pork, soy/tofu, and cow’s milk; avoid artificial fragrances; prefer eco-friendly packaging. Substitution questions: email kesha.williams@example.com.
